duplicate_line_suspects.line_b: La Aroma del Caribe Base Line
La Aroma del Caribe Mi Amor

line_merges.reason: Holt's Oliva Monticello page lists Double Toro (6x60) as a size of Monticello, not a separate line. Shared listing URL was the only signal for the false split.
Shared Holts Sanctum listing; Double is a longer 60-ring Gordo (60x216), not a separate line.
Shared Holts Serie 1968 listing; Double is 60x152 Toro size of the same line.
Shared Holts Viejo listing; Double is 60x152 Toro size of the same line.
Shared Holts Quorum Maduro listing; Double is a single Gordo (60x152) size of the same line.
Shared Holts Sam Leccia White listing; Double is 60x152 Toro size of the same line.
Shared Holts Exodus Gold 20th listing; Double is 60x152 Toro size of the same line.
El Criollito Short is the Short Gordo size of El Criollito (cigarworld a-flores-el-criollito-short-gordo), not a separate line.
Gran Reserva Maduro Grand is the Grand Toro size of Gran Reserva Maduro (cigarworld …-maduro-grand-toro), not a separate line.
Gran Reserva Sun Grown Grand is the Grand Toro size of Gran Reserva Sun Grown (cigarworld …-sun-grown-grand-…), not a separate line.
Coyol ships six sizes including Double Churchill and Petit Lancero (halfwheel / cigar-coop 2014). Catalog split those sizes into fake lines.
Lineage sizes include Robusto 552 and Double Toro 665 (halfwheel Lineage launch; cigarworld product pages). Not separate lines. | Size/named vitola suffix "Gigante 770" of Lineage.
Boutique G Toro is the Petit Toro size of Boutique G (cigarworld alfambra-boutique-g-petit-toro), not a separate line. | Size/named vitola suffix "Magnificos" of Boutique G.
